lore.story: The heir to Wind Fort, a wind mage.

skill.name: Windtalk
skill.description: Vale gains 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Windtalk</font> each time he gets a kill or an assist that increases his Movement Speed by 8. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

skill.name: Wind Blade
skill.description: Vale unleashes two wind blades toward the left and right of a target area, each dealing 250<font color="62f8fe"> (+80% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies hit.

skill.name: Windblow
skill.description: Vale sends a whirlwind in the target direction, dealing 350<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies hit and knocking them airborne for 0.8s (each enemy can only be knocked airborne 1 time). When the whirlwind reaches its destination, it will remain for 1.6s while continuously dealing a total of 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies in range.

skill.name: Windstorm
skill.description:
Vale summons a windstorm at the target location, dealing a total of 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies in the area and slowing them by 20% while continuously pulling them into its center. After 1s, the windstorm will explode, dealing 900<font color="62f8fe"> (+240% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>.

The remaining whirlwinds will also be pulled into the center.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Vale's 2nd Skill to knock a line of enemies airborne, then follow up with his Ultimate and 1st Skill for a devastating combo.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, use Vale's 2nd Skill to knock the opponent airborne, then follow up with his 1st Skill for damage.
